ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "fips" TEXT /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code for the county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income for the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., AL, CA, NY) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the zip code is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code (e.g., 12345, 90210) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the zip code */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the zip code in square miles */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zip code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zip code */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the demographic data is from */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the county (e.g., 20-30: 30%, 30-40: 25%) */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Racial distribution of the county */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the county */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* Education level distribution of the county */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, business analyst, policymaker) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file in bytes */,
  "export_duration" REAL /* Duration it took to export the data in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being visualized */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_url" TEXT /* URL of the visualization if it is stored externally */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view data, export data) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the role has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
